subcodes.first_line: O ye children of the Kingdom! There lies great heavenly capacity in that country. The people have receptive minds for the Divine Grace and are ready to embrace
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ابناء ملکوت الله در اقلیم آلمان استعداد ملکوتی بسیار است نفوس قابل فیوضات
subcodes.subjects: @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @love and unity, @unity; oneness of humanity
